heading: Program to increase employment opportunities in House of Representatives for individuals with disabilities
label: 5531 Program to increase employment opportunities in House of Representatives for individuals with disabilities
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 130j of this titleSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2003, which is div. H of the Consolidated Appropriations Resolution, 2003.

children.text: enter into 1 or more contracts with nongovernmental entities to provide for the performance of services for offices of the House of Representatives by individuals with disabilities who are employees of, or under contract with, such entities; and
provide reasonable accommodations, including assistive technology devices and assistive technology services, to enable such individuals to perform such services under such contracts.
traditional and nontraditional outreach efforts are used to attract individuals with disabilities for educational benefit and employment opportunities in the House;
the non-governmental entity provides adequate education and training for individuals with disabilities to enhance such employment opportunities; and
efforts are made to educate employing offices in the House about opportunities to employ individuals with disabilities.

children.heading: Funding
children.label: c Funding
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated from the applicable accounts of the House of Representatives $500,000 to carry out this section for each of the fiscal years 2003 through 2007.
